sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7861" key="a)/ndema" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄνδεμα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνδεσμός</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνδέχομαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνδέω</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄνδημα</orth>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀναδ-.</foreign> </entryFree>
